1) We use an acronym to cover the fact that our name is boring (TSMC, ASML, AMD)
2) We use a portmanteau to cover the fact that our name is boring (Intel, NVIDIA)
3) Minor League Baseball Team (Tokyo Electron, Texas Instruments)
